item.title: Anti-tank tips for civilians
item.description: Amazing and useful thread. Sharing here in hopes it helps. Source for first tweet: https://twitter.com/hogan698/status/1497291283106250761
item.dc:creator: truthsmiles

item.title: Please forward this to anyone yo know in Ukraine or bordering states.
item.description:
If you can translate this for Ukrainians, please do! This very hour. If you know friends in Ukraine, or even nearby states like Poland or Moldova, please send this to them, asking them to pass it along to any Ukrainians they know. Do it now.
EDIT: weaken roads from underneath in sewers, make ditches too big for tanks to span, put fake IEDs with wires in potholes to force an unarmored crew to come investigate. And thermite in a can with a fuse and with glue or magnets on the exterior. And: accept surrender wherever possible.
item.dc:creator: jasonPositivityPilot

item.title: Sanction Fox, and sanction Carlson until he is removed from the air.
item.description: Tucker Carlson openly supports Vladimir Putin, and his criminal acts of war against a free and sovereign nation; while at the same time denigrating with malice his own President of the United States Joe Biden. Tucker Carlson is a traitor to United States democracy and must be removed from the air. To anyone thinking, this isn't how a free society deals with a person's opinion. Under other circumstances you are right, but Carlson's views are broadcast and used by Russian state media to direct the narrative of their war crimes. Carlson knows this yet remains complicit in providing them with sound bytes. Carlson is using his platform to aid the enemy in illegal activities. This activity is flagrant malice as well and can be brought to court.
item.dc:creator: TheResolver

item.title: Hey. We're having chocolate chip pancakes. Come on over, rest a while.
item.description: Tiny octopus wishes he could make pancakes for anyone who wanted them. Today especially. Normally it would be waffles, but there was an ice storm last night, so it's a pancake sort of morning. Be well everyone. Choose kindness.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Let’s not go backwards
item.description: I understand that Putin is homophobic and that calling him gay would be offensive to him. But it’s taking us back to a time when “gay” was an insult, and it’s sending the message that being gay is something shameful or worth being hated for. There are PLENTY of reasons to shit on Putin without insulting an already-marginalized population. *steps off soapbox* Edit: Did you all just… miss the first sentence of what I wrote? Edit 2: I want to remind everyone that Putin won’t see your posts on here. But young gay kids might. Having grown up in an environment where people WERE insulted to be called gay, I took a long time to realize that it wasn’t a character flaw and that I wasn’t worth less because of it. Of all the decorations in my class, the one that gets the most comments is my Pride flag, and kids literally come to me for advice/ validation. This stuff about “LGBT folks are fine with it” isn’t accurate. Just because you are, it doesn’t mean everyone is. #standwithukraine #fuckputin #lgbt
item.dc:creator: ptothedubs

item.title: Your average Russian is smarter than your average Republican

item.title: I've struggled how to put this into words, but here is some vital information about the situation in Ukraine
item.description:
I've seen so many posts and comments about the situation in Ukraine, and I have been so distraught about most of the posts/comments involving the situation that I feel like I need to say something.
From everything that I know and what I believe, Ukrainians are some of the fiercest fighters out there and will protect their homeland with everything they have. Men, Women, and everyday citizens will take up arms to defend their home country... their livelihoods.... to repel Putin and his bullshit army
What you're seeing in these pictures may seem like inexperienced people that will fold easily when Russian troops roll in, but I see some of the strongest people I've ever seen in my life.
Imagine your country, your state, your city coming under attack by a foreign military that is trying to take away everything that you love. You're beloved country now in disarray.
I know that a lot of people are asking "Why isn't NATO doing more to help out"? The direct answer is.... they can't. NATO is a defensive collaboration between countries under a pact, and the unfortunate fact is, Ukraine is not part of it
Ukraine has been seeking membership with NATO, and that's why Putin is so upset with Ukraine right now. Russia sees Ukraine joining NATO as a direct threat to Russia. Now, this makes no sense, being that Ukraine is only seeking protection from countries like Russia (kind of a Catch 22)
A lot of people are wondering why the US military doesn't just go in and stomp the shit out of the Russian military. Well, this would lead to all out war with multiple Nations armed with Nuclear weapons.
Vladimir Putin is an extremely unstable person at the moment, and there's no telling what he would do if he's trapped in a corner. Nuclear war has no winners... we all die or suffer long lasting repercussions
Now is the time to stand with Ukraine. Almost every country in the world is on Ukraine's side. Ukrainians know more than all of us, that they are in this fight primarily by themselves. We will provide as much ammunition, weapon systems, and intelligence as we can, but nuclear war is not something that can be risked
I know that a lot of people don't think that sanctions do anything, but the Russian economy is feeling the pain. The ruble is at it's lowest value in a long time, and this is just the beginning.... Sanctions take time to show the real effect, but they are effective
F1 Grand Prix has been canceled in Russia, and this is just the start.... Nobody will want to be involved with Russia after what they've done... Russia will be ostracized from the world venue for all revenues
The Russian people don't want this either. This is the desperate act of a failing leader
I'm not a religious person, but pray for our Ukrainian friends, brothers, and sisters fighting the good fight... fighting for their country!
item.dc:creator: parknasty913

item.title: Day 273: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Aisle Nine Baconator Two 5oz Beef Patties, 2 Slices Of Cheddar, 4 Strips Of Thick Cut Applewood Smoked Bacon, Dill Pickles, Ketchup And Mayo, And Finished On A Charcoal Grill For That Outdoor Smokehouse Bbq From Aisle Nine Gourmet Burgers & Poutine In Greater Sudbury, ON, Canada Thank You @yodadude For This Burger Submission! 12/10! Previous Day 272: https://imgur.com/gallery/lUMqihi MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD

item.title: “I’m the most special son of a bitch, nobody has ever been as special- I’ll tell ya what, I know the most about being special and a son of a bitch. Ask anybody. Ask Jimmy. Jimmy knows.”
item.description: I can hear his fucking verbal replies automatically now. I’m not shocked 1/3 of my fellow pick-me Americans blindly followed him because he lets them be ok with protecting their four and no more. He is the idiot’s messiah. Jimmy summed it up perfectly.
item.dc:creator: PrincessPicklebricks
